prompt: Generate a watercolor painting of a pagoda based on the silhouette. Place it on land with trees or grass.
prompt_refined: Generate a watercolor painting of the multi-tiered pagoda depicted in image 1. The artwork should exhibit characteristic watercolor textures, soft washes, and blended colors. Position the pagoda centrally on a natural landscape, featuring green grass in the foreground and surrounding trees or foliage in the background.
